title: Immunofluorescence Assay for Detection of ZIKA Virus Envelope Protein
author: Elen Mello de Souza
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jqycmxw
materials: Follow the infection up to 72 hours.

steps.title: Seed Vero cells on coverslips into...
steps.instruction: Seed Vero cells on coverslips into 24- well plate at a density of 2 x 10 5 cells/ well.

steps.title: Infect with 50 µl of the...
steps.instruction: Infect with 50 µl of the viral suspension at the multiplicity of infection (MOI) 1 for 1h / 37°C to allow for virus adsorption, under agitation every 15 minutes.

steps.title: Wash 3 times the cell monolayer...
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times the cell monolayer with Phosphate-buffered saline (PBSx1) to remove non-adsorbed viral particles.

steps.title: Each 24 h remove two coverslips out the plate
steps.instruction: Each 24 h remove two coverslips out the plate.

steps.title: Fixation with 500 µl of the...
steps.instruction: Fixation with 500 µl of the 4% paraformaldehyde (PFA) for 20 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS.

steps.title: Permeabilize the cells with 200 µl of the 0
steps.instruction: Permeabilize the cells with 200 µl of the 0.1% Triton X-100 diluted in PBS for 5 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS.

steps.title: Block no-specificity binding with 200 µl...
steps.instruction: Block no-specificity binding with 200 µl of the 3% bovine serum albumin (Sigma-Aldrich) for 30 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS.

steps.title: Incubate with 50 µl of the...
steps.instruction: Incubate with 50 µl of the mouse IgG2a monoclonal antibody anti-ZIKA virus envelope protein (4G2) diluted in PBS (1: 4) for 60 minutes at 37°C.

steps.title: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS.

steps.title: Incubate with 50 µl of the...
steps.instruction: Incubate with 50 µl of the secondary antibody Alexa Fluor 488 (1: 500) (Invitrogen) for 60 minutes at 37°C.

steps.title: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times the coverslips with PBS.

steps.title: Incubate with 50 µl of the...
steps.instruction: Incubate with 50 µl of the 10 μg/ ml 4,6-diamidino-2-phenylindole (DAPI) (Sigma-Aldrich) diluted in PBS for 5 minutes at 37°C, for visualization of the cell nucleus.

steps.title: Mount the coverslips with 10 µl of the 2
steps.instruction: Mount the coverslips with 10 µl of the 2.5% 1,4-diazabicyclo(2,2,2)-octane (DABCO) (Sigma-Aldrich) to prevent loss of fluorescence.
